data.name: Self
data.description: House of identity, physical presence, temperament, self-expression and the way the native enters life.

data.name: Resources
data.description: House of personal resources, money, possessions, values, material security and what the native develops or preserves.

data.name: Communication
data.description: House of communication, learning, siblings, local environment, short journeys and everyday exchanges.

data.name: Home
data.description: House of roots, family foundations, home, private life, ancestry and the base from which the native is built.

data.name: Creativity
data.description: House of creativity, pleasure, romance, children, play, self-expression and personal joy.

data.name: Health
data.description: House of work routines, service, health, maintenance, duties, skills and practical adjustments.

data.name: Partnership
data.description: House of partnership, marriage, contracts, open opponents, cooperation and direct one-to-one relationships.

data.name: Transformation
data.description: House of shared resources, debts, inheritance, crisis, intimacy, loss, transformation and deep psychological processes.

data.name: Beliefs
data.description: House of beliefs, higher learning, philosophy, religion, law, long journeys and broadening perspectives.

data.name: Career
data.description: House of career, vocation, public role, reputation, authority, ambition and visible achievement.

data.name: Community
data.description: House of friends, groups, networks, alliances, collective projects, hopes and long-term aspirations.

data.name: Subconscious
data.description: House of retreat, hidden matters, solitude, unconscious patterns, confinement, spiritual release and what remains behind the scenes.
